reason: This pass designs the regional color system and stabilizes prompts/output paths first. Image-generation background threads should start only after the user reviews the prompt plan.

thread_strategy.batching_reason: The five regional color-system boards must read as one coherent palette family while preserving regional differences.
worker_requirements: Use available image generation capability for raster assets.
Write images exactly to the assigned project paths.
Do not edit existing project style-board images or faction emblem images.

Use the current stable faction emblem PNGs as references when faction marks appear: project/severed-homeland/assets/style/faction-emblems/emblem_zhaoming_empire.png, project/severed-homeland/assets/style/faction-emblems/emblem_suming_qingming_state.png, and project/severed-homeland/assets/style/faction-emblems/emblem_northern_beastfolk_alliance_wanshou.png.
Do not redesign, redraw, replace, or overwrite the current faction emblem PNGs, and do not reference history/ emblem files.
Do not generate text labels, captions, UI, letters, or watermarks inside images.
Return a compact manifest of created files and any failures.

planned_threads.worker_prompt: Generate the five raster regional color-system board images defined in project/severed-homeland/prompts/project-regional-color-system-image-prompts.json for asset_batch project_regional_color_system_v01. Preserve the written regional color design in project/severed-homeland/art/project-regional-color-system.md and the machine-readable palette in project/severed-homeland/art/project-regional-color-system.json. Reference the already-designed current faction emblem PNGs when faction marks appear: project/severed-homeland/assets/style/faction-emblems/emblem_zhaoming_empire.png, project/severed-homeland/assets/style/faction-emblems/emblem_suming_qingming_state.png, and project/severed-homeland/assets/style/faction-emblems/emblem_northern_beastfolk_alliance_wanshou.png. Use those files for shape/material language only; do not redesign, redraw, replace, or overwrite them, and do not use history/ emblem files. Write each image to its exact expected_output_path under project/severed-homeland/assets/style/regional-color-system/. Do not modify existing project style-board images, faction emblems, or historical assets. The images must contain no visible text labels, captions, letters, UI, or watermarks. Return a compact manifest listing generated files, dimensions, and any blocked items.

launch_policy.approval_needed: User requested launch on 2026-06-02; launch the planned Codex background thread after recording the current emblem reference policy.
